steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Self-assess reconnaissance skills from 1-5 covering passive, active, and OSINT techniques
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for advanced readiness assessment
steps.expected_output: Honest rating of reconnaissance capability with specific strengths identified

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Rate enumeration proficiency including service, protocol, and vulnerability enumeration
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Enumeration skill assessment showing comfort with multiple techniques

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Assess web application testing skills covering SQLi, XSS, authentication, and APIs
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Web security knowledge rating from basic to advanced techniques

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Rate network attack proficiency including MitM, sniffing, and service exploitation
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Evaluate exploitation abilities covering Metasploit, custom exploits, and shellcode
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Exploitation skill level from basic payloads to advanced custom code

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Create 30-day study and practice plan targeting identified skill gaps
steps.expected_output: Structured improvement plan with specific learning resources and timelines

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Schedule 2 CTF challenges covering weak areas for practical skill building
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Scheduled CTF challenges reinforcing identified skill gaps
